generated: Warranty story generated — tap Audit Story when ready for MI scoring
generatedRevision: Story improved with tech details — tap Audit Story to refresh the score
roNotLoaded: Repair order not loaded — go back and reopen the line
lineNotFound: Repair line not found — refresh the RO and try again
clearCustomerPayFirst: Clear Customer Pay mode first to generate a warranty story with AI.
scoreWaitGenerate: Wait for story generation to finish before auditing
scoreNeedStory: Generate or write a warranty story before running the audit
scoreStale: Story changed during audit — run Audit Story again.
scoreCustomerPaySkip: Customer Pay stories skip AI audit — edit the text if needed.
